highlights.text: Discovery — events, markets, categories, trending, search, sports
Pricing — orderbooks, spreads, price history, last trade, tick size
Analytics — open interest, top holders, leaderboard, volume
Batch tools — multi-token prices, orderbooks, spreads in one call
Zero credentials — public APIs, no auth needed, instant setup

readme:
### What it does

Polymarket gives your AI agent access to the world’s largest prediction market. Browse events across politics, crypto, sports, and culture. Get real-time prices, order books, and spreads. Analyse market structure with open interest, top holders, and trader leaderboards.

22 tools span three Polymarket APIs, each serving a different purpose:

### Three APIs, one server

| API | Tools | Purpose |
|-----|-------|---------|
| Gamma | 9 | Discovery — events, markets, search, categories, trending, sports |
| CLOB | 8 | Pricing — orderbooks, best price, spreads, history, last trade, tick size |
| Data | 5 | Analytics — open interest, top holders, leaderboard, volume |

### Batch operations

Scanning multiple markets? The batch tools (`pm_prices_batch`, `pm_orderbooks_batch`, `pm_spreads_batch`) fetch data for multiple tokens in a single call. This keeps your agent under rate limits and saves context window when comparing markets.

### Zero-config setup

Polymarket’s public APIs require no authentication. Install the server and start querying immediately — no API keys, no OAuth, no certificate generation. The server handles rate limiting automatically.

### What you can answer

- What are the current odds on the next US election?
- Which prediction markets have the highest volume today?
- How has the price for a specific outcome moved over the past week?
- Who are the largest holders in a controversial market?
- What’s the bid-ask spread on low-liquidity markets?

scenarios.label: Daily prediction market briefing
scenarios.body: Fetch trending markets, get current prices for tracked events, check volume and price movement, and summarise the day’s notable shifts.

scenarios.label: Deep-dive market analysis
scenarios.body: Search for an event by keyword, get all markets and current prices, pull orderbook depth and spreads, check top holders and open interest to assess market conviction.

scenarios.label: Cross-market price scan
scenarios.body: Batch-fetch prices across a category of markets, identify mispriced outcomes by comparing related events, and flag markets with unusual spread widening.

env.name: POLYMARKET_MCP_API_TOKEN
env.description: Bearer token for HTTP transport auth (optional)

setup.blurb: Connect to Polymarket for prediction market data — real-time prices, market search, analytics. No credentials required.

certification.security_notes: Read-only v1. No credentials. No SSRF. Per-endpoint rate limiting. Write gates present for v2.
